title: Wonderwall’s Vanilla+
description: This Modpack delivers the perfect balance between simplicity and beauty. Experience a lightweight yet visually refined survival journey with optimized performance, immersive visuals, and seamless gameplay.
body:
# My Goal About This Modpack
**With Wonderwall's Vanilla+, I want to achieve the ideal balance between elegance and simplicity. Without overly altering the fundamental gameplay, my goal was to improve the vanilla experience by adding more immersive elements, improved performance, and smoother visuals. Each mod has been chosen with care to maintain the game's fluidity, polish, and light weight while offering a flawless experience. For all kinds of players, this modpack provides a sophisticated experience from exploration to building and survival. Pure survival with improved graphics and performance—no clutter, no distractions—providing an optimized, yet straightforward, and entertaining Minecraft experience. Discover Minecraft the way it was intended to be—beautiful, useful, and fluid. I hope you enjoy!**
